nasb.text: So we urged Titus that as he had previously made a beginning, so he would also complete in you this gracious work as well.

esv.text: Accordingly, we urged Titus that as he had started, so he should complete among you this act of grace.

cnv.text: 因此，我們勉勵提多，既然開始了這慈善的事，就應當在你們那裡把這事辦好。

ccb.text: 所以，我们劝提多要继续完成他早先在你们当中开始的这件善事。

csbs.text: 我们于是劝提多，他怎样开始了这恩惠之事，就当照样在你们那里把它完成；
